# IM Wealth Select®

> Authoritative resource on private bank selection, monitoring, and wealth management in Switzerland, including methodologies, evaluations, publications, and insights for high net worth individuals and advisors.

IM Wealth Select® provides guidance on selecting and monitoring private banks and wealth managers, emphasizing independence, transparency, and comprehensive evaluation in the Swiss financial landscape.

## Core Content

- [Our Approach](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/approach.html)
  Detailed description of the structured, conflict-free process for diagnosing client needs, selecting and negotiating with banks, and ongoing monitoring.

- [Diagnose](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/approach.html#diagnose)
  Methods for clarifying client objectives, risk profiles, and evaluating current banking arrangements.

- [Select & Negotiate](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/approach.html#select)
  Process of tendering to multiple providers, comparing offers, and negotiating favorable terms.

- [Monitor](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/approach.html#monitor)
  Strategies for tracking performance, costs, risks, and service quality across chosen banking relationships.

- [Swiss Private Banks and Managers](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/approach.html)
  Data and evaluations of over 80 Swiss private banks, including 14 Kantonal banks and 5,300+ investment managers.

- [Publications](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/publications.html)
  Articles on benchmarking, fees, estate planning, and succession related to private banking.

## Resources

- [Latest Publications](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/publications.html)
  Insights and perspectives on private banking topics, updated regularly for clients and professionals.

## Optional

- [Team](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/team.html)
  Information about the experts and advisors behind the evaluations and guidance.

- [Request a Banking Review](https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/contact.html)
  Contact page for personalized assessment and advice.

## Languages

- English: https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/
- Français: https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/fr/
- Deutsch: https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/de/
- Italiano: https://www.im-wealthselect.ch/it/
